title: Add Visualize ERD Icon to Dictionary Object Details (Fields) Page
story: As a DataTools Pro user browsing an object's field details in the Dictionary, I want a 'Visualize' icon that opens the ERD representation of that object, so that I can quickly see how the object relates to others without navigating away from the fields page.
description:
Adds a "Visualize" icon to the Dictionary object details (fields) page, positioned after the filter control. Clicking the icon navigates the user to the ERD page with the selected object highlighted, providing a quick way to see the entity relationship context for the object being reviewed.

This extends the Visualize button concept from MBT-1056 to the individual object detail level.
acceptance_criteria: A Visualize icon appears on the Dictionary object details (fields) page after the filter
Clicking the icon navigates to the ERD with the current object highlighted
The ERD loads with the appropriate view context for the object
The icon is visually consistent with other action icons on the page
ux_changes: Visualize icon added to the Dictionary object details page next to the filter control. Provides one-click navigation to the ERD view for that object.
implementation_notes: Extends the Dictionary-to-ERD navigation pattern to the object field detail level. Complements MBT-1056 which adds the Visualize button at the Dictionary list level.
comment_summary: Developer implemented most functionality quickly, needed a few tweaks, then deployed to development for review.
